brand_identity.name: SaveStack
brand_identity.description: The central nervous system for your digital life. Save, organize, and monetize content from any social platform.
brand_identity.tone: Organized, Visual, Premium, Minimalist but Colorful
brand_identity.target_audience: Content Creators, Digital Marketers, Curators, Power Users

headings.usage: Landing page headlines, major section titles, feature names. DO NOT use for body text.

body.usage: Dashboard UI, long-form text, inputs, labels, buttons.

mono.usage: Code snippets, API keys, technical details.

rules.headings: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for all headings larger than 24px.

gradients.glass_surface: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

glassmorphism.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm

dashboard_grid.rule: Use 'react-masonry-css' or pure CSS columns for the feed view to accommodate varying content heights (images vs text).

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-all

cards.content_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1
cards.feature_card: rounded-3xl border border-border/50 bg-gradient-to-b from-white/50 to-white/10 dark:from-white/5 dark:to-transparent backdrop-blur-md p-8

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-xl border-input bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-sm px-4 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

icons.usage: Use Lucide for UI (Home, Settings, User). Use React Icons (FontAwesome 6) for Brands (FaInstagram, FaTiktok, FaYoutube, FaTwitter, FaPinterest).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react react-icons framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Use the `Manrope` font for UI elements and `Outfit` for Headings. Add the import to `index.css`.
Implement the 'Dark/Light' toggle immediately in the Navbar.
The Dashboard MUST use a masonry-style layout for the saved content items.
Use the mapped images for the landing page hero and feature sections.
Do NOT use standard 'blue' links. Use the brand colors defined in the JSON for platform-specific links.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx`.
